general.name: mos_target_assignment_parquet
general.description: This table stores the assignment of a given target in a carton to a fiber of a given instrument. A collection of assignments are included within a design, which is one configuration of the robots for an exposure.
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_assignment.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

pk.name: pk
pk.description: The primary key. A sequential identifier.

carton_to_target_pk.name: carton_to_target_pk
carton_to_target_pk.description: The primary key of the carton_to_target in the dr20_carton_to_target table.

hole_pk.name: hole_pk
hole_pk.description: The primary key of the hole in the dr20_hole table.

instrument_pk.name: instrument_pk
instrument_pk.description: The primary key of the instrument in the dr20_instrument table.

design_id.name: design_id
design_id.description: The primary key of the design in the dr20_design table.
